audit.document_excerpt: Gameplay packets are the realtime packets used after a client is connected to the game server and, for gameplay mutation, attached to an active game player. Client-originated gameplay intent currently travels over the WebSocket session/control path, while server-originated active gameplay output travels over WebRTC gameplay DataChannels: `sr.world`, `sr.overlay`, `sr.session`, `sr.event`, `sr.asteroids.lifecycle`, and `sr.bullets.lifecycle` remain ordered/reliable, while `sr.asteroids` and `sr.bullets` are unordered/unreliable hot-update lanes.
